summary: M472 — defer Supabase save pushes during combat. A 3-enemy fight was firing ~27 PATCHes against /rest/v1/saves; now it fires ~1. cloudSaves.pushSave caches per-key while window.__inCombat=true; CombatScreen.onExit flushes once with the latest record. Mid-combat interrupt loses progress by design (per user).
